description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural brown finish and visible wood grain texture. The handle is ergonomically shaped, tapering towards the blade and ending in a rounded knob for a secure grip. The axe head is made of dark metal, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite end. The blade edge is straight and sharp, suitable for chopping or splitting wood, while the poll is flat for hammering tasks. The head is securely mounted onto the handle, with the wood passing through the eye of the blade and likely wedged for stability. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on either the handle or the blade.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a dark metal wedge-shaped blade, designed for chopping and splitting tasks. The handle is ergonomic and the blade is securely mounted, with no visible markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, wedge-shaped metal blade.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow width of the handle and the rectangular cross-section of the blade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the end of the handle and the sharp edge of the blade extending outward.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a rounded end, ergonomic grip, visible wood grain, oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single wedge-shaped steel blade with a straight edge and flat poll, no beard, functional and undecorated.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle passing through the eye of the blade.
